channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The missing men in America's marriage market
item.description: A study suggests growing educational and economic gaps between men and women are reshaping marriage and family life, leaving many women without partners.

item.title: House delays prediction market ban despite bipartisan support
item.description: Minority Leader Jeffries urges Speaker Johnson to hold a vote on banning prediction markets as soon as possible.

item.title: What is known and unknown about U.S. government spyware use
item.description: Critics fear the Trump administration is weakening policies that previously discouraged the use of commercial spyware to remotely hack phones.

item.title: Sharp decline in Affordable Care Act enrollment, analysis shows
item.description: Enrollment in Healthcare.gov and other marketplaces has dropped by 5 million, according to a new KFF analysis. Congress failed to extend enhanced subsidies last year.
